fields.name: Leadership Confidence
fields.description: Evidence of increased leadership confidence, voice, and decision-making in participants

fields.name: Self-Esteem Improvement
fields.description: Participant reports improved self-worth, dignity, and identity

fields.name: Education Access

fields.name: Safety and Protection
fields.description: Narratives addressing gender-based violence, safety, survivor support, and rights protection
